moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Continues
moments.blurb: The 23rd FIFA World Cup, co-hosted by the USA, Canada, and Mexico, is in full swing, running from June 11 to July 19, 2026, with group stage and early knockout matches currently dominating headlines.

angles.name: Match Day Buzz
angles.copy: Who are you backing in today's World Cup fixtures? The group stages are heating up, and every game counts! #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Team England Focus
angles.copy: England played Panama on June 27th at 5 PM ET (10 PM BST). What's your verdict on their performance so far in the World Cup?

angles.name: Tournament Talk
angles.copy: From record-breaking goals to surprising upsets, the FIFA World Cup 2026 is already delivering! What's been your favourite moment so far?

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Begins Next Week
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon, the third Grand Slam tennis tournament of the year, is set to begin on Monday, June 29, 2026, bringing two weeks of world-class grass-court action to London.

angles.name: Anticipation Build-up
angles.copy: Get ready, tennis fans! Wimbledon 2026 kicks off on Monday. Who are you tipping for the men's and women's singles titles this year?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: The iconic grass courts of SW19 are almost ready! Wimbledon 2026 starts Monday, bringing the world's best to London. Who's excited?

moments.title: TRNSMT 2026 Just Wrapped Up
moments.blurb: Scotland's biggest music festival, TRNSMT, concluded last weekend (June 19-21) at Glasgow Green, featuring headliners Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi, and is still a major talking point for music fans.

angles.name: Festival Recap
angles.copy: What a weekend! TRNSMT 2026 brought the party to Glasgow Green with incredible sets from Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, Lewis Capaldi & more. What was your highlight?

angles.name: Best Performance
angles.copy: Still buzzing from TRNSMT? Which artist delivered the performance of the festival for you?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Top UK Chart
moments.blurb: "Rein Me In" by Sam Fender and Olivia Dean has returned to the Official UK Singles Chart No. 1 spot for its 14th nonconsecutive week, making it a significant chart success.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: It's a huge week for Sam Fender & Olivia Dean as 'Rein Me In' reclaims the UK No. 1 spot for a massive 14th week! Are you loving it?

angles.name: New Record
angles.copy: 'Rein Me In' is making history on the Official Singles Chart! Congrats to Sam Fender & Olivia Dean on their incredible run at number one.

moments.title: Ariana Grande's 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for hits like 'Thank U, Next' and '7 Rings', celebrated her 33rd birthday yesterday, having been born on June 26, 1993.

angles.name: Birthday Shout-out
angles.copy: Happy belated 33rd Birthday to the incredible Ariana Grande! What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Yesterday we celebrated Ariana Grande turning 33! Her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits continue to define pop music.

moments.title: H.E.R. Turns 29 Today
moments.blurb: Grammy and Oscar-winning R&B singer-songwriter H.E.R. (Gabriella Wilson), known for her soulful voice and hits like 'Slide', celebrates her 29th birthday today, June 27, 1997.

angles.name: Birthday Wish
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 29th Birthday to the immensely talented H.E.R. What's your go-to track from her amazing catalogue?

moments.title: Bruce Johnston Turns 84
moments.blurb: Bruce Johnston, long-standing member of The Beach Boys, known for his vocals and songwriting contributions, celebrates his 84th birthday today, June 27, 1942.

angles.name: Beach Boys Legend
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to Bruce Johnston of The Beach Boys! His contributions helped shape some of the most iconic songs ever.

moments.title: Cheryl Cole's 43rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Singer and TV personality Cheryl Cole, who rose to fame with Girls Aloud and as a solo artist, will celebrate her 43rd birthday on June 30, 1983.

angles.name: Pop Princess Birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Cheryl Cole turns 43 on Sunday. What's your favourite Girls Aloud or solo hit?

moments.title: Debbie Harry Turns 81
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic frontwoman, Debbie Harry, known for her distinctive style and vocals on hits like 'Heart of Glass', will celebrate her 81st birthday on July 1, 1945.

angles.name: New Wave Icon
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the legendary Debbie Harry on July 1st! What's your ultimate Blondie anthem?

moments.title: Burna Boy's 34th Birthday
moments.blurb: Nigerian superstar Burna Boy, a leading figure in Afrobeats and known globally for tracks like 'Ye' and 'Last Last', will turn 34 on July 2, 1992.

angles.name: Afrobeats King
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate Burna Boy's 34th birthday on Tuesday! Drop your favourite track from the African Giant!

moments.title: Huey Lewis Turns 76
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis & The News, famous for 80s hits like 'The Power of Love' and 'Hip to Be Square', will celebrate his 76th birthday on July 5, 1950.

angles.name: 80s Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Can you believe Huey Lewis turns 76 this Friday? We're celebrating with 'The Power of Love' all day!

moments.title: Ringo Starr's 86th Birthday
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr (Richard Starkey), known for his distinctive style and solo career, will celebrate his 86th birthday on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! Ringo Starr turns 86 next Tuesday. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

moments.title: Love Island UK Season 13 Heats Up
moments.blurb: The new season of Love Island UK is currently airing, with a fresh batch of Islanders in sun-drenched Mallorca seeking romance and drama.

angles.name: Islander Drama
angles.copy: Love Island is bringing the heat! Who's your favourite Islander so far and what's been the biggest shock of the season?

angles.name: Couple Goals?
angles.copy: Are any of the Love Island couples built to last this season? Let us know your predictions!

moments.title: New Thriller 'The Dark' Coming to ITV
moments.blurb: A new moody thriller, 'The Dark', starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, is set to premiere on ITV and ITVX on July 12, exploring a serial killer in the Scottish wilderness.

angles.name: New ITV Thriller
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! New moody thriller 'The Dark' arrives on ITV and ITVX on July 12th. Ready for some chilling Scottish drama?

angles.name: Scottish Mystery
angles.copy: From the idyllic Scottish wilderness comes a new serial killer drama, 'The Dark', on ITV from July 12th. This looks intense!
